item.title: The bounciest ball
item.description: I show you a ball bouncing on one of the world's bounciest surfaces

media:content.media:title: The bounciest ball
media:content.media:description: I show you a ball bouncing on one of the world's bounciest surfaces

item.title: The loudest sound inside the quietest room
item.description: In this video, I traveled to 3M to see how silence is science. Watch to see how the quietest room is used to study how sound waves move, which helps build the sound-damping products we use every day.

media:content.media:title: The loudest sound inside the quietest room
media:content.media:description: In this video, I traveled to 3M to see how silence is science. Watch to see how the quietest room is used to study how sound waves move, which helps build the sound-damping products we use every day.

item.title: The singing pipe
item.description: In this video I show you how a mysterious experiment where a heated pipe begins to make sound! I talk about resonant and natural frequencies and show you some neat experiments that make sound using resonant frequencies.

media:content.media:title: The singing pipe
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how a mysterious experiment where a heated pipe begins to make sound! I talk about resonant and natural frequencies and show you some neat experiments that make sound using resonant frequencies.

item.title: Frictionless torpedo
item.description: I show you how to make a ball that slices through water like its not there.

media:content.media:title: Frictionless torpedo
media:content.media:description: I show you how to make a ball that slices through water like its not there.

item.title: Turning a hose into a vacuum cleaner
item.description: I show you how to make an impromptu vacuum cleaner

media:content.media:title: Turning a hose into a vacuum cleaner
media:content.media:description: I show you how to make an impromptu vacuum cleaner

item.title: How to create a gold ball?
item.description: In this video I take the Japanese foil ball challenge yet again and make the first ever Golden polished foil ball! You have probably seen the Japanese aluminum foil ball challenge video where people have made polished foil balls with aluminum foil. However, this polished foil ball is only for the elite polished foil ball makers! See what's inside from start to finish and also watch what happens when I put a gold polished foil ball in the vacuum chamber and put gold foil by itself in the vacuum chamber!

media:content.media:title: How to create a gold ball?
media:content.media:description: In this video I take the Japanese foil ball challenge yet again and make the first ever Golden polished foil ball! You have probably seen the Japanese aluminum foil ball challenge video where people have made polished foil balls with aluminum foil. However, this polished foil ball is only for the elite polished foil ball makers! See what's inside from start to finish and also watch what happens when I put a gold polished foil ball in the vacuum chamber and put gold foil by itself in the vacuum chamber!

item.title: Spinning a top within a top
item.description: I show you how the topsy turvy top works and how a top rights itself.

media:content.media:title: Spinning a top within a top
media:content.media:description: I show you how the topsy turvy top works and how a top rights itself.

item.title: How does a digital sundial work?
item.description: In this video I show you how the first digital sundial works. I talk about sundials and how they can change in accuracy and become off by hours over millions of years due to the slowing rotation of the earth.

media:content.media:title: How does a digital sundial work?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how the first digital sundial works. I talk about sundials and how they can change in accuracy and become off by hours over millions of years due to the slowing rotation of the earth.
